name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
summary: Important Note: The Department has identified certain suspected cases that may fall under the exclusion criteria outlined in the PM-KISAN scheme guidelines.
official_excerpt: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi Contact Us Sitemap Skip to main content Screen Reader Access English Assamese Gujarati Hindi Kannada Malayalam Marathi Tamil Telugu Urdu Login External Logins CSC Login eMitra Login eGramaone Login eGrama Login PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Government of India HOME About Us About The Scheme SCHEME EXCLUSION Hindi Version English Version FAQ Revised FAQ Basic FAQ Additional FAQ Guidelines Operational Guidelines Revised Operational Guidelines Financing Facility under Agriculture Infrastructure Fund Other Guidelines Transfer Of Benefits Through Npci Fund Transfer Guidelines Pm Kisan Refund Mechanism Aadhar Seeding Of Database Of Beneficiaries Reimbursement Of Expenses On Block, District & State Level Launch Functions Setting Up Of Grievance Mechanism By States & Ut Archive Pre-Revised Operational Guidelines Amendment In Operational Guidelines Clarification To Operational Guidelines Amendment To Operational Guidelines - Manipur Clarifications Related To Clauses 3.3 & 3.4 PM-KMY Operational Guidelines Salient Features FAQ Ineligibility/Corrections/In process Letter / Circulars Know About eKYC Process Communication & Outreach Press Release Leaflets Creatives Social Media Articles & Newsletter Videos New Farmer Registration Know Your Status The Hon’ble Prime Minister has released the 22nd installment of the PM-KISAN on 13th March 2026 from Guwahati, Assam. eKYC is MANDATORY for PMKISAN Registered Farmers. OTP Based eKYC is available on PMKISAN Portal or nearest CSC centres may be contacted for Biometric based eKYC. Important Note: The Department has identified certain suspected cases that may fall under the exclusion criteria outlined in the PM-KISAN scheme guidelines. These include, for example: (i) Farmers who acquired land ownership after 01-02-2019, (ii) Cases where more than one family member is receiving benefits (e.g., both husband and wife, an adult member and minor, etc.). The benefits for such cases have been temporarily withheld till physical verification is completed. Farmers are requested to check their eligibility status on Know Your Status (KYS) of PM KISAN website/ mobile app or Kisan eMitra chatbot for further details. HBP New Inclusion Request Am I Eligible Find Hospital Grievance Portal National Health Authority would like to inform that www.pmjay.gov.in is the only official website of Ayushman Bharat – Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB PM-JAY). Issued in public interest by National Health Authority. name: Stand-Up India Scheme
summary: Stand-Up India Scheme Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Support for manufacturing, services, trading, and allied agriculture
official_excerpt: Something went wrong. Please try again later. Ok Are you sure you want to sign out? Cancel Sign Out | | English English Theme Sign In © 2026 Powered by Digital India Corporation(DIC) Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY) Government of India ® Connect on Social Media Quick Links About Us Contact Us Screen Reader Accessibility Statement Frequently Asked Questions Disclaimer Terms & Conditions Dashboard Useful Links Get in touch 4th Floor, NeGD, Electronics Niketan, 6 CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi - 110003, India support-myscheme[at]digitalindia[dot]gov[dot]in (011) 24303714 (9:00 AM to 5:30 PM) Last Updated On : 28/04/2026 | v- 3.1.8 Entrepreneurship Support to Women and SC & ST Communities Stand-up India Scheme facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore Apply Here 299274 Total Applications Total Amount 275321 Sanctioned Applications Sanctioned Amount 24613 Handholding Agencies 4663 HHA Requests 77 Lenders Onboarded 160489 Branches Connected What is Stand-Up India? Stand-Up India Scheme Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise. This enterprise may be in manufacturing, services, agri-allied activities or the trading sector. In case of non-individual enterprises at least 51% of the shareholding and controlling stake should be held by either an SC/ST or woman entrepreneur. Salient Features Borrower Type Loans to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs above 18 years. Enterprise Loans for setting up greenfield enterprise. Loan size Loans between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore. Nature of Loan Composite loan (inclusive of Term Loan and Working Capital). Promoter Contribution 15% Margin money. Security Security cover under Credit Guarantee Fund Scheme for Stand-Up India Loans (CGFSIL). Key Elements Stand-Up India Ecosystem How to Apply Impact Stories POONGOTHAI S K. TAMIL NADU / CHENNAI Vision and Optics Pursuing Entrepreneurial Pursuits Ms Poongodhai is the beneficiary under STAND UP INDIA loan scheme of Rs.10.50 lakh. She has been given loan for setting up of Optometric clinic with vision therapy as she is a low vision therapist as well as OPTICAL GALLERY at Ashok Nagar Chennai. The loan has been sanctioned by PNB, Anna Nagar Branch, Chennai. The account is regular. Gaining experience from her father in law, the promoter has become a specialist in low vision therapy and is happy that she is able to STAN

summary: Total Investment Latest News : NIC has developed a new module to capture the payments made to the beneficiaries through multiple instalments as per the Mission directions Pradhan Mantri Aawas Yojna Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban (PMAY-U)(30) a flagship Mission of Government of India being implemented by Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA), was launched on 25th June 2015.

Central Assistance Commited Cr. Central Assistance Released Lakh Cr. Total Investment Latest News : NIC has developed a new module to capture the payments made to the beneficiaries through multiple instalments as per the Mission directions Pradhan Mantri Aawas Yojna Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban (PMAY-U)(30) a flagship Mission of Government of India being implemented by Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA), was launched on 25th June 2015. The Mission addresses urban housing shortage among the EWS/LIG and MIG categories including the slum dwellers by ensuring a pucca house to all eligible urban households by the year 2022, when Nation completes 75 years of its Independence. Affordable Rental Housing Complexes Ministry of Housing & Urban Affairs has initiated Affordable Rental Housing Complexes (ARHCs), a sub-scheme under Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U). This will provide ease of living to urban migrants/ poor in Industrial Sector as well as in non-formal urban economy to get access to dignified affordable rental housing close to their workplace. Global Housing Technology Challenge – India MoHUA has initiated the Global Housing Technology Challenge - India (GHTC-India) which aims to identify and mainstream a basket of innovative construction technologies from across the globe for housing construction sector that are sustainable, eco-friendly and disaster-resilient. Light House Project Enroll as TechnoGrahi CLSS Awas Portal (CLAP) A web based monitoring system, CLSS Awas Portal (CLAP) is a common platform where all stakeholders i.e. MoHUA, Central Nodal Agencies, Primary Lending Institutions, Beneficiaries and Citizens are integrated in real time environment.
